title: The Fleetfoot Festival, Highlight of the Season

text_block_list.name: Shrine-carrying Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Shrine, coming through! Everyone join us in the chant to give us
strength!

text_block_list.name: Shrine-carrying Umamusume
text_block_list.text: And a one, two, hup! And a one, two, hup!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I am moved! This year's shrine procession is wonderfully impactful as
always!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The audience numbers have already broken records, so I hear. Let us
also gear up to give our own show-stopping performances!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, ma'am! Not long left now... 'til the show... The big show!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yukino, you okay? We still have some time, so why don't we relax a
little and wander around over there?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Oh, um...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
...No! I wanna go over the choreography one last time with Curren! I'm
fine, I promise!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh... okay. Do your thing.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
All right! The ending is looking good! ♪ You really nailed getting it
cute, Yukino!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Curren! Thank you so much! We're so close to the performance, but
you're still help'n me!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Don't sweat it! I want us all to look super cute out there!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Curren! There you are! The costume fitter was looking for you.
Said they want to get started soon.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ah! It's that time already? Thank you, City. Well, Yukino, I'll see you
later!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ever since the training camp, you've been doing a lot of practice with
Curren, haven't you?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Wha? Th-that's because... we're in the same class... maybe?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Um, City... Are you... m-mad at me?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: No, not really.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...You know, you could've come to me at least once. I get that Curren
has more to teach you, but—

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: I-it's not that!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I wanna be like you... No, I mean, I wanted to make sure I wouldn't
embarrass you! That's why...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yukino...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I mean... the word's aren't com'n out right. In any case, I'm gonna give
it my all!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
With my head held high and pride in my heart, I'll dance my heart
out!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(City is so beautiful. So, so beautiful. I've always wanted t'be just like
her.)

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(And this time, I managed to look her in the eyes and talk to her
without runn'n away! Right now, I'm shar'n the same stage as her!)

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(I want to stand tall like this forever! I wanna be glitzy and glam'rous
too!)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(Yukino—ah, can't get distracted. If I'm not careful, all my attention
will go on you.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: (You look beautiful—tonight, especially... But I won't be outshone!)

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
(Look at those two go. The mood between them is so intense, the
audience can't keep their eyes off them.)

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
(Well, that won't do at all. ♪ Look over here, everybody. Remember
who you all came to see?)

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
...Wow, look at City and Curren... even Yukino. They all look so
dignified. So beautiful... They're simply awe-inspiring.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. You know, when I saw the older students run in the Kikuka Sho,
I began to wonder if I could really do the same...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: But now I'm determined. I'm gonna give it my best too.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, the target's really not here! They're inside the sacred
mountain! They were really serious about doing it the traditional
way?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume D
text_block_list.text:
President Rudolf and Vice President Brian look so powerful... It's
kinda scary actually. But still... I can't wait to see how this turns out!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: (Hehe. Brian's idea is an instant success.)

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Understood! So you're nominating Curren Chan, Gold City, and
Yukino Bijin to perform the ceremonial dance, correct?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Each one will bring a unique color and charm to the performance.
I believe they are all capable of excelling in this endeavor.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Approved! And as for the archery show! The URA has sent an official
notice that they'd like you to participate. Will you accept their
request?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If they ask it of me, I shall oblige. As for the other participant, may I
make a very strong recommendation?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Indubitably! Who is it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Narita Brian. My indispensable comrade.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Brian, do you remember the day I made you vice president?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Naturally, I've never forgotten.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You out of your mind? You want me to be vice president of the
student council? Ha, you've got to be joking.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Though I am currently learning to jest, I am nowhere near skilled
enough to unveil my jokes. This is an earnest request. Brian, I want to
appoint you as vice president.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Hold on. You were running the student council on your own until last
year.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
And then the one who went up against you for president—who was it,
Air Groove? She's your vice president now, right?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You've got twice the workforce now. Isn't that enough?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, it is not, Brian. Now that I have my right hand, my
ambition has grown. I want to reach toward an ideal world, and for
that, I'd like you to join me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
An Umamusume of pure instinct. A soul that burns passionately. It can
only be you, Brian.

text_block_list.name: Presenter Umamusume
text_block_list.text: The bonfire has been lit. The archery show hereby begins!

text_block_list.name: Presenter Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ready, set... go!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: GRRRAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
(Heh... Haha! There it is! It's enough to give me goosebumps! Brian,
your raging fangs... your ferocious instincts... they're as dazzling as
always!)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: (And the way you look doing archery...)

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: Whoa, so cool... I'm trembling!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
(Your unveiled instincts, your vigor—they're enough to stir any
Umamusume's spirits!)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: And it seems like I'm no exception!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Bow before me, "Beast"! HAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Aw, the Fleetfoot Festival went so quickly. This year was even more
lively than usual, I wish it would go on longer...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. City's group dance and the presidents' archery really lit a fire in
me. I'll look back on this fondly.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Tonight's noble Fleetfoot Festival ended without incident.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
May every Umamusume stay sound of health, and may they find glory
in their future.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Yes, indeed. Tonight's Fleetfoot festival was simply... superb.
